name: @tank/macos-configurator
description: macOS system configuration via CLI. Covers defaults write, networksetup, pmset, systemsetup, scutil, hidutil, and PlistBuddy for keyboard, trackpad, Dock, Finder, network (DNS, proxy, Wi-Fi), power, display, sound, security, and per-app settings. Generates idempotent setup scripts. Companion to @tank/macos-cleanup and @tank/macos-maintenance. Triggers: configure mac, mac setup, macos defaults, key repeat, dock settings, change dns, dark mode, hot corners, caps lock remap, dotfiles.
